scale.name: dynasty_0_10000
scale.description: Replacement-anchored cardinal trade value: best asset = 10000, startable replacement = 100, sub-replacement dust in [0,100). Monotone in value_z; players and picks share the scale. value null = unvalued (see unvalued_reason).
